listOfQuestions.question: In Cloud and DevOps, what does "Container" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A packaged runtime environment for an application
wrongAnswers: Managing deployment and operation of many containers
A built output produced by a software pipeline
Collecting information about system health and behavior

listOfQuestions.question: In Cloud and DevOps, what does "Image" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A template used to create containers
wrongAnswers: Managing infrastructure through versioned configuration files
A named value supplied to a running process
A numeric measurement collected over time

listOfQuestions.question: In Cloud and DevOps, what does "Orchestration" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Managing deployment and operation of many containers
wrongAnswers: Automatically building and testing frequent code changes
Protecting credentials used by systems and applications
A recorded event from a system or application

listOfQuestions.question: In Cloud and DevOps, what does "Infrastructure as code" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Managing infrastructure through versioned configuration files
wrongAnswers: Automatically releasing validated changes to users
A component that distributes traffic across servers
A record of a request moving through system components

listOfQuestions.question: In Cloud and DevOps, what does "Continuous integration" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Automatically building and testing frequent code changes
wrongAnswers: An automated sequence of build, test, and release steps
Adjusting computing capacity as demand changes
An unplanned service disruption or degradation

listOfQuestions.question: In Cloud and DevOps, what does "Continuous deployment" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Automatically releasing validated changes to users
wrongAnswers: A built output produced by a software pipeline
Collecting information about system health and behavior
Returning a deployed system to a previous version

listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: An automated sequence of build, test, and release steps
wrongAnswers: A named value supplied to a running process
A numeric measurement collected over time
Rolling out a change to a small group before wider release
